title: Product Feedback App
description: Frontend Mentor challenge built with Angular. A product feedback UI with filtering, sorting, and comments.

title: Recipe App
description:
A modern, responsive web application for browsing, filtering by category, and viewing detailed recipe information. The project focuses on a scalable system with a clean architecture.
Note: Hosted on a free cloud tier, the initial load may take longer due to server wake-up (Cold Start).

title: Frontend Quiz App - Angular
description: I refactored from an old Fronted Mentor „Frontend Quiz App” VueJs version to Angular + GSAP

title: Hangman Game
description: A solution to the Frontend Mentor 'Hangman Game' challenge, built with Angular. The goal was to implement a modern, responsive interface for the classic hangman game.
